text: Alif, Lām, Rā. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].
tl: Alif-Laaam-Raa; tilka Aayaatul Kitaabi Wa-Qur-aa-nim Mubeen

text: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.
tl: Rubamaa yawaddul lazeena kafaroo law kaanoo muslimeen

text: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.
tl: Zarhum yaakuloo Wa-yatamatta'oo Wa-yulhihimul amalu fasawfa ya'lamoon

text: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.
tl: Wa-maaa ahlaknaa min qaryatin illaa Wa-lahaa kitaabum ma'loom

text: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.
tl: Maa tasbiqu min ummatin ajalahaa Wa-maa yastaakhiroon

text: And they say, \"O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.
tl: Wa-qaaloo yaaa-aiyuhal lazee nuzzila 'alaihiz Zikru innaka lamajnoon

text: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?\"
tl: Law maa taateenaa bil-malaaa'ikati in kunta minas saadiqeen

text: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and they [i.e., the disbelievers] would not then be reprieved.
tl: Maa nunazzilul malaaa'i-kata illaa bilhaqqi Wa-maa kaanooo izam munzareen

text: Indeed, it is We who sent down the message [i.e., the Qur’ān], and indeed, We will be its guardian.
tl: Innaa Nahnu nazalnaz Zikra Wa-Innaa lahoo lahaa-fizoon

text: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muḥammad], among the sects of the former peoples.
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa min qablika fee shiya'il awwaleen

text: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.
tl: Wa-maa yaateehim mir Rasoolin illaa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: Thus do We insert it [i.e., denial] into the hearts of the criminals.
tl: kazaalika naslukuhoo fee quloobil mujrimeen

text: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.
tl: Laa yu'minoona bihee Wa-qad khalat sunnatul awwaleen

text: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,
tl: Wa-law fatahnaa 'alaihim baabam minas samaaa'i fazaloo feehi ya'rujoon

text: They would say, \"Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic.\"
tl: Laqaaloo innamaa sukkirat absaarunaa bal nahnu qawmum mashooroon

text: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.
tl: Wa-laqad ja'alnaa fis samaaa'i buroojanw Wa-zaiyannaahaa linnaazireen

text: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allāh]
tl: Wa-hafiznaahaa min kulli Shaitaanir rajeem

text: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.
tl: Illaa manis taraqas sam'a fa-atba'ahoo shihaabum mubeen

text: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.
tl: Wal-arda madadnaahaa Wa-alqainaa feehaa rawaasiya Wa-ambatnaa feehaa min kulli shai'im mawzoon

text: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.
tl: Wa-ja'alnaa lakum feehaa ma'aayisha Wa-mal lastum lahoo biraaziqeen

text: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known [i.e., specified] measure.
tl: Wa-im min shai'in illaa 'indanaa khazaaa-'inuhoo Wa-maa nunazziluhooo illaa biqadarim ma'loom

text: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.
tl: Wa-arsalnar riyaaha la-waaqiha fa-anzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'an fa-asqai-naakumoohu Wa-maaa antum lahoo bikhaazineen

text: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor.
tl: Wa-innnaa la-nahnu nuhyee Wa-numeetu Wa-nahnul waarisoon

text: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].
tl: Wa-la-qad 'alimnal mustaqdimeena minkum Wa-laqad 'alimnal mustaakhireen

text: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.
tl: Wa-inna Rabbaka Huwa yahshuruhum; innahoo Hakeemun 'Aleem

text: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.
tl: Wa-laqad khalaqnal insaana min salsaalim min hama-im masnoon

text: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.
tl: Waljaaanna khalaqnaahu min qablu min naaris samoom

text: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, \"I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.
tl: Wa-iz qaala Rabbuka lilmalaaa'-ikati innee khaaliqum basharam min salsaalim min hama-im masnoon

text: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration.\"
tl: Fa-izaa sawwaituhoo Wa-nafakhtu feehi mir roohee faqa'oo lahoo saajideen

text: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,
tl: Fasajadal malaaa'ikatu kulluhum ajma'oon

text: Except Iblees; he refused to be with those who prostrated.
tl: Illaaa ibleesa abaaa ai yakoona ma'as saajideen

text: [Allāh] said, \"O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?\"
tl: Qaala yaaa-Ibleesu maa laka allaa takoona ma'as saajideen

text: He said, \"Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud.\"
tl: Qaala lam akul li-asjuda libasharin khalaqtahoo min salsaalim min hama-im masnoon

text: [Allāh] said, \"Then depart from it, for indeed, you are expelled.
tl: Qaala fakhruj minhaa fa-innaka rajeem

text: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense.\"
tl: Wa-inna 'alaikal la'nata ilaa Yawmid Deen

text: He said, \"My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbi fa-anzirneee ilaa Yawmi yub'asoon

text: [Allāh] said, \"So indeed, you are of those reprieved
tl: Qaala fa-innaka minal munzareen

text: Until the Day of the time well-known.\"
tl: Ilaa Yawmil waqtil ma'loom

text: [Iblees] said, \"My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them [i.e., mankind] on earth, and I will mislead them all
tl: Qaala Rabbi bimaaa aghwaitanee la-uzayyin-anna lahum fil ardi Wa-la-ughwiyan-nahum ajma'een

text: Except, among them, Your chosen servants.\"
tl: Illaa 'ibaadaka minhumul mukhlaseen

text: [Allāh] said, \"This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.
tl: Qaala haaza Siraatun 'alaiya Mustaqeem

text: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.
tl: Inna 'ibaadee laisa laka 'alaihim sultaanun illaa manit taba'aka minal ghaaween

text: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.
tl: Wa-inna jahannama lamaw'iduhum ajma'een

text: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them [i.e., Satan's followers] a portion designated.\"
tl: Lahaa sab'atu abwaab; likulli baabim minhum juz'um maqsoom

text: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs,
tl: Innal muttaqeena fee Jannaatinw Wa-'uyoon

text: [Having been told], \"Enter it in peace, safe [and secure].\"
tl: Udkhuloohaa bisalaamin aamineen

text: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other.
tl: Wa-naza'naa ma fee sudoorihim min ghillin ikhwaanan 'alaa sururim mutaqaabileen

text: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed.
tl: Laa yamas-suhum feehaa nasabunw Wa-maa hum minhaa bimukhrajeen

text: [O Muḥammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful,
tl: Nabbi' 'ibaadeee annneee an al-Ghafoorur Raheem

text: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment.
tl: Wa-anna 'azaabee huwal 'azaabul aleem

text: And inform them about the guests of Abraham,
tl: Wa-nabbi'hum 'an daifi Ibraaheem

text: When they entered upon him and said, \"Peace.\" [Abraham] said, \"Indeed, we are fearful [i.e., apprehensive] of you.\"
tl: Iz dakhaloo 'alaihi faqaaloo salaaman qaala innaa minkum wajiloon

text: [The angels] said, \"Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy.\"
tl: Qaaloo la tawjal innaa nubashshiruka bighulaamin 'aleem

text: He said, \"Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform?\"
tl: Qaala abashshartumoonee 'alaaa am massaniyal kibaru fabima tubashshiroon

text: They said, \"We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing.\"
tl: Qaaloo bashsharnaaka bilhaqqi falaa takum minal qaaniteen

text: He said, \"And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray?\"
tl: Qaala Wa-mai yaqnatu mir rahmati Rabbiheee illad daaaloon

text: [Abraham] said, \"Then what is your business [here], O messengers?\"
tl: Qaala famaa khatbukum aiyuhal mursaloon

text: They said, \"Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals,
tl: Qaaloo innaaa ursilnaaa ilaa qawmim mujrimeen

text: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all
tl: Illaaa Aala Loot; innaa lamunajjoohum ajma'een

text: Except his wife.\" We [i.e., Allāh] decreed that she is of those who remain behind.
tl: Illam ra-atahoo qaddarnaaa innahaa laminal ghaabireen

text: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot,
tl: Falamma jaaa'a Aala Lootinil mursaloon

text: He said, \"Indeed, you are people unknown.\"
tl: Qaala innakum qawmum munkaroon

text: They said, \"But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,
tl: Qaaloo bal ji'naaka bimaa kaanoo feehi yamtaroon

text: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful.
tl: Wa-atainaaka bilhaqqi Wa-innaa lasaadiqoon

text: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded.\"
tl: Fa-asri bi-ahlika biqit'im minal laili wattabi' adbaarahum Wa-laa yaltafit minkum ahadunw wamdoo haisu tu'maroon

text: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.
tl: Wa-qadainaaa ilaihi zaalikal amra anna daabira haaa'ulaaa'i maqtoo'um musbiheen

text: And the people of the city came rejoicing.
tl: Wa-jaaa'a ahlul madeenati yastabshiroon

text: [Lot] said, \"Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.
tl: Qaala inna haaa'ulaaa'i daifee falaa tafdahoon

text: And fear Allāh and do not disgrace me.\"
tl: Wattaqul laaha Wa-laa tukhzoon

text: They said, \"Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?\"
tl: Qaalooo awalam nanhaka 'anil 'aalameen

text: [Lot] said, \"These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage].\"
tl: Qaala haaa'ulaaa'i banaateee in kuntum faa'ileen

text: By your life, [O Muḥammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.
tl: La'amruka innahum lafee sakratihim ya'mahoon

text: So the shriek seized them at sunrise.
tl: Fa-akhazat-humus saihatu mushriqeen

text: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.
tl: Faja'alnaa 'aaliyahaa saafilahaa Wa-amtamaa 'alaihim hijaaratam min sijjeel

text: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern.
tl: Inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil lilmutawassimeen

text: And indeed, they [i.e., those cities] are [situated] on an established road.
tl: Wa-innahaa labi-sabeelim muqeem

text: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.
tl: Inna fee zaalika la-Aayatal lilmu'mineen

text: And the companions of the thicket [i.e., the people of Madyan] were [also] wrongdoers,
tl: Wa-in kaana Ashaabul Aikati lazaalimeen

text: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway.
tl: Fantaqamnaa minhum Wa-innahumaa labi-imaamim mubeen

text: And certainly did the companions of al-Ḥijr [i.e., the Thamūd] deny the messengers.
tl: Wa-laqad kazzaba ashaabul Hijril mursaleen

text: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.
tl: Wa-aatainaahum Aayaatinaa fakaanoo 'anhaa mu'rideen

text: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.
tl: Wa-kaanoo yanhitoona minal jibaali buyootan aamineen

text: But the shriek seized them at early morning,
tl: Fa-akhazat-humus saihatu musbiheen

text: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.
tl: Famaaa aghnaa 'anhum maa kaanoo yaksiboon

text: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.
tl: Wa-maa khalaqnas samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaaa illaa bilhaqq; Wa-innas Saa'ata la-aatiyatun fasfahis safhal jameel

text: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.
tl: Inna Rabbaka Huwal khallaaqul 'aleem

text: And We have certainly given you, [O Muḥammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur’ān.
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaaka sab'am minal masaanee wal-Qur-aanal 'Azeem

text: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.
tl: Laa tamuddanna 'ainaika ilaa maa matta-'naa biheee azwaajam minhum Wa-laa tahzan 'alaihim wakhfid janaahaka lilmu-'mineen

text: And say, \"Indeed, I am the clear warner\" -
tl: Wa-qul inneee anan nazeerul mubeen

text: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators
tl: Kamaaa anzalnaa 'alal muqtasimeen

text: Who have made the Qur’ān into portions.
tl: Allazeena ja'alul Quraana 'i-deen

text: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all
tl: Fawa-Rabbika lanas'a-lannahum ajma'een

text: About what they used to do.
tl: Ammaa kaanoo ya'maloon

text: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists.
tl: Fasda' bimaa tu'maru Wa-a'rid anil mushrikeen

text: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers
tl: Innaa kafainaakal mustahzi'een

text: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.
tl: Allazeena yaj'aloona ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhar; fasawfa ya'lamoon

text: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.
tl: Wa-laqad na'lamu annaka yadeequ sadruka bimaa yaqooloon

text: So exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].
tl: Fasbbih bihamdi Rabbika Wa-kum minas saajideen

text: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty [i.e., death].
tl: Wa'bud Rabbaka hattaa yaatiyakal yaqeen
